item.title: Old-School Mini Golf Course Tour
item.description: Explore a classic mini golf course with old-school charm, creative design, and a fun gameplay experience.

media:content.media:title: Old-School Mini Golf Course Tour
media:content.media:description: Explore a classic mini golf course with old-school charm, creative design, and a fun gameplay experience.

item.title: Pirate's Cove 2-Ball Mini Golf Challenge
item.description: Brooks Holt takes on a 2-ball mini golf challenge at Pirate's Cove, featuring fun course play and a classic themed setting.

media:content.media:title: Pirate's Cove 2-Ball Mini Golf Challenge
media:content.media:description: Brooks Holt takes on a 2-ball mini golf challenge at Pirate's Cove, featuring fun course play and a classic themed setting.

item.title: Hawaiian Rumble Mini Golf Tournament
item.description: A look at the Hawaiian Rumble mega mini golf tournament and its challenging course design.

media:content.media:title: Hawaiian Rumble Mini Golf Tournament
media:content.media:description: A look at the Hawaiian Rumble mega mini golf tournament and its challenging course design.

item.title: Disney’s Winter Summerland Mini Golf Tournament
item.description: A mini golf tournament at Disney’s Winter Summerland, featuring playful course design and a fun putt-putt experience.

media:content.media:title: Disney’s Winter Summerland Mini Golf Tournament
media:content.media:description: A mini golf tournament at Disney’s Winter Summerland, featuring playful course design and a fun putt-putt experience.

item.title: Elisha’s Hole-in-One at Mulligan’s Lagoon
item.description: A fun mini golf moment at Mulligan’s Lagoon, featuring a memorable hole-in-one and a look at the course experience.

media:content.media:title: Elisha’s Hole-in-One at Mulligan’s Lagoon
media:content.media:description: A fun mini golf moment at Mulligan’s Lagoon, featuring a memorable hole-in-one and a look at the course experience.
